message:
web: Add team dashboard with analytics and member management

- Add team dashboard page with activity metrics, charts, and member table
- Add queries for team stats, activity by user, model/agent usage
- Add getTeamDashboardData server function with period filtering
- Support hourly grouping for 24h view, daily for longer periods
- Include input validation (1-365 days) and UTC timezone consistency
- Delete old team.tsx, merge member management into dashboard

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/tlgnjnlr0609w18yndkkmxds

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,27 @@ title: "Changelog"
 description: "Product updates and announcements"
 ---
 
+<Update label="February 1, 2025">
+## Interactive Upload Command
+
+New `npx agentlogs upload` command to browse and upload transcripts from any agent.
+
+- **Interactive picker**: Browse all local transcripts with an interactive TUI
+- **Multi-agent support**: Discovers transcripts from Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode
+
+See the [CLI commands reference](/cli/commands#upload) for full usage details.
+</Update>
+
+<Update label="February 1, 2025">
+## Team Dashboard
+
+The team page now features a comprehensive dashboard with analytics and member management.
+
+- **Activity metrics**: View total team logs, lines added, modified, and removed
+- **Activity trend chart**: Stacked area chart showing daily (or hourly for 24h) activity per team member
+- **Usage charts**: See agent and model usage across your team
+</Update>
+
 <Update label="January 31, 2025">
 ## Transcript Deletion
